briefdescription.para: Error table data structure LC version.
This function handles the CPM_NCR error.

parameterdescription.para: is the node ID for the error event
is the register mask of the error received

briefdescription.para: This function handles the XPPU errors.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XPPU
is string prefix to be used while printing event info

briefdescription.para: This function handles the XMPU errors.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the XMPU
is string prefix to be used while printing event info

briefdescription.para: This function provides error table pointer.
This function reconfigures error actions after the update.

parameterdescription.para: is the Node Type of the EAM register
is the Node Type of the EAM register.

briefdescription.para: This function handles the CPM_NCR PCIE link up event.

parameterdescription.para: is the PCIE0/1/2/3 IR status register address
is the Pcie Bridge Misc Status register address
is the ProcId for PCIE0/1/2/3 link up event

briefdescription.para: This function is the interrupt handler for Error action "Print to Log".

detaileddescription.para: This function prints detailed information if the error is due to XMPU/XPPU protection units.

ErrorNodeId
is the node ID for the error event
RegMask
is the register mask of the error received
This function prints detailed information if the error is due to XMPU/XPPU protection units.

ErrorNodeId
is the node ID for the error event
RegMask
is the register mask of the error received
None
This function prints detailed information if the error is due to XMPU/XPPU protection units.

parameterdescription.para: is the node ID for the error event.
is the register mask of the error received.

inbodydescription.para: Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information
Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information
Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information
Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information
Print NodeId, Mask and Error ID information

briefdescription.para: This function dumps EAM Error status registers and Gic Status registers.

parameterdescription.para: of Error
of Error
of the the Error

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on success and error code on failure

parameterdescription.para: of Error
of Error
of the the Error
of Error.
of Error.
of the the Error.

inbodydescription.para:
For HBM Cattrip, only support actions are:
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_INVALID
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_POR
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_SRST
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_CUSTOM
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_ERROUT

For HBM Cattrip, only support actions are:
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_INVALID
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_POR
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_SRST
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_CUSTOM
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_ERROUT

For HBM Cattrip, only support actions are:
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_INVALID
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_POR
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_SRST
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_CUSTOM
XPLMI_EM_ACTION_ERROUT

briefdescription.para: This function provides pointer to NumErrOuts.
